description: Formal nine-zone 50-Agent P0 experiment using main T1/T6 origins and destinations with the experiment-branch activity state flow.

outdoor_exposure.bus: origin access walk plus wait plus destination access walk
outdoor_exposure.metro: origin access walk plus platform wait plus destination access walk
outdoor_exposure.w2_rain_method: outdoor minutes overlapping active heavy-rain windows

scope_notes: Agent profiles, home zones, activities, destination zones, OD distances and planned times come from the main T1/T6 pipeline.
W0/W1/W2 use paired planned activities. Weather cancellation and remote work alter travel-required activities only after the common plan is built.
This first formal migration runs P0 only; coupon, elder priority and supply policies remain separate later experiments.
All behavioral and heat parameters are scenario assumptions, not Shanghai estimates.
